text: The air here is bright and sterile, the tilt of my perspective making the clean lines of glass and tech seem disorienting and almost surreal. Entering the exhibition, I am both curious and slightly out-of-place—a feeling of tentative anticipation. Surrounded by the language of innovation and research, I sense the human drive to understand, to build, to explain. I am both observer and participant in this constructed space of possibility, reflecting on what it means to be at the edge of human knowledge. The atmosphere is hopeful, futuristic, yet tinged with the existential wonder of what comes next.
